name: harness-steward
description: Project-level AI coding discipline for Claude Code and Codex. Nine skills that activate at key development moments and consult project-specific sediment to keep work aligned.

interface.longDescription: Nine project-level skills for requirement evaluation, implementation scoping, task review, debugging with history, lesson capture, and periodic audits across AI-driven codebases.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo's harness for drift and stale rules.
Review this completed task against project sediment before commit.
Load project context before we start implementing this feature.
